expectedAnswers: Not bad, thanks! How about you?
Pretty good! Just got my coffee.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否自然回应了问候并反问对方
语言准确性：语法正确，无明显错误
表达自然度：使用了口语化表达，符合职场日常语境

content.speakerText: Good morning, Tom! How are you today?
expectedAnswers: I'm doing well, thanks! How about you?
Not too bad. The coffee here is amazing today.
Pretty good! Slept well last night.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：回应问候并适当扩展或反问
语言准确性：使用恰当的时态和词汇
表达自然度：包含生活细节，体现真实对话感

content.speakerText: Morning, Sarah! You look great today!
content.speakerTextCn: 早上好，Sarah！你今天看起来很棒！
expectedAnswers: Thanks! I just had a good night’s sleep.
Oh, thank you! You look great too!
I appreciate that! Coffee really helped today.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：礼貌回应赞美并可能回赞或补充原因
语言准确性：使用恰当的感谢表达和语法结构
表达自然度：语气真诚，符合职场友好互动习惯
